c.d: Allows users to rate movies and write reviews, influencing overall app ratings and recommendation accuracy
c.s: Apple App Store Raters, Google Play Raters, Letterboxd

c.d: Algorithm suggesting movies based on user taste, group preferences, and similar user profiles
Ability to follow friends and other users, share reviews, and get group recommendations
Provides links and suggestions on where to watch movies across multiple streaming platforms
Number of active users/downloads which can affect diversity of reviews and recommendations
Number and variety of movies and shows available to rate and review
Whether the app contains ads or in-app purchases affecting user experience
